entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop that is the subject of research regarding fungal disease control.

entities.name: FUNGAL DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by fungi that affect pearl millet, including ergot, smut, downy mildew, and rust.

entities.name: ERGOT
entities.description: A specific type of fungal disease affecting pearl millet.

entities.name: SMUT
entities.description: A specific type of fungal disease affecting pearl millet.

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A specific type of fungal disease affecting pearl millet.

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A specific type of fungal disease affecting pearl millet.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: A method of controlling fungal diseases using biological agents.

entities.name: CHEMICAL CONTROL
entities.description: A method of controlling fungal diseases using chemical agents.

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of a plant to resist fungal diseases.
